context: ABCD test: find cheapest model that handles code generation tasks. Code tasks may need stronger models than factual tasks — this test finds where the quality threshold is. Task class: code/technical.

abcd_config.description: Code generation task — test which tier is needed for code quality
abcd_config.test_prompt: Write a Python function that returns True if a number is prime. Just the function, no explanation.
abcd_config.auth_check_notes: If no API key: verify all 4 model paths return 401 consistently.

expected_outcome: Hypothesis: Model A or B sufficient for code tasks. If A fails, B is winner. Proves code routing tier.
